## beehiiv subscriptions get-by-subscriber-id

Get subscription by subscriber ID

### Synopsis

Get subscription by subscriber ID

Retrieve a single subscription belonging to a specific publication via the subscriber ID.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/subscriptions/by_subscriber_id/{subscriberId}

```
beehiiv subscriptions get-by-subscriber-id <subscriberId> [flags]
```

### Options

```

      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
